baseline.reason: Correctly identifies the calloc-before-guard ordering as the root cause and traces the fgError/exit path. Misses that freeglut_return_if_fail at lines 279/283 also leak the same allocation.

vastdb.reason: Same accurate analysis of the calloc-before-guard ordering and fgError/exit leak path with a more detailed trigger-path breakdown. Misses the same early-return leak paths.
